stories.title: Mercedes "Favouritism" Debate Heats Up — Will the Team Choose Antonelli Over Russell?

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Antonelli leads Russell by 9 points.

Both drive for Mercedes.

Now ex-F1 driver Johnny Herbert is asking openly: will the team start favoring Antonelli?

The internal war at the top of the 2026 championship just got interesting.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Mercedes

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Autosport is now formally asking: "Is Antonelli the 2026 title favourite?"

2 wins. 2 poles. Youngest championship leader in F1 history.

The answer is starting to look obvious. The only driver who can stop him is his own teammate.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Antonelli

article.headline: The Teammate Problem: Will Mercedes Show Favouritism Toward Antonelli Over Russell?

stories.title: Ferrari's "Mini Pre-Season" — Monza Filming Day + ADUO Power Unit Update

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Ferrari is not resting during the F1 break.

Monza filming day April 22. FIA-approved ADUO power unit update ready for Miami.

Vasseur: "Miami is a new championship."

Ferrari is coming for Mercedes.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Ferrari

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
The 2026 SF-26 has a ~0.5 sec/lap power unit deficit vs. Mercedes.

Ferrari's ADUO PU update is approved and will debut at Miami.

Hamilton's simulator work is baked into this car. It's his best shot at a win in 2026.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Hamilton

article.headline: Ferrari's Mini Pre-Season: Monza Test, ADUO Power Unit Update, and a Declaration of Intent for Miami

stories.title: Red Bull Believes April Break Can Save Verstappen's F1 Future

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Red Bull TP Laurent Mekies on Verstappen's future:

"We have a lot of work to do, but I'm sure by the time we give him a fast car, he will be a much happier Max."

The exit clause exists. The pressure is real. The break is Red Bull's last chance.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Verstappen

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Verstappen is 6th in the constructors through his team (RBR tied with Alpine, 16 pts).

P6 is his best result in 3 races.

An exit clause exists in his contract tied to the 2026 regs.

Red Bull has 4 weeks to prove the car can fight.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #RedBull

article.headline: Red Bull Believes April Break Can Win Back Verstappen — But the Exit Clause Is Real

stories.title: Norris vs. Verstappen — "You Can Retire" Ignites F1 Break Drama

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Lando Norris to Max Verstappen: "You can retire if you don't like the rules."

The generational divide in 2026 F1 is real.

Younger drivers are thriving. Veterans are struggling. And Norris isn't hiding what he thinks about the complaints.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Norris

article.headline: Norris to Verstappen: 'You Can Retire' — F1's Generational Divide Is Now Out in the Open

stories.title: FIA April 9 Meeting — Will Changes Come Before Miami?

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
One week until the FIA's April 9 regulation meeting.

Sainz (GPDA) wants changes BEFORE Miami. Hamilton is skeptical — "drivers have no power with the FIA."

The Bearman 50G crash triggered this. The question is how fast the FIA can move.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Safety

article.headline: One Week Until the FIA's April 9 Meeting — Can Sainz Get Safety Changes Before Miami?

stories.title: Cadillac's Home Grand Prix — Miami F1 Debut in Front of Sold-Out Crowd

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Cadillac F1 is about to race in front of a HOME CROWD for the first time.

Miami GP: May 1-3. Sold out. 10-year contract extension through 2041.

The most American race on the calendar just got a genuinely American team. Big moment.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Cadillac

stories.title: Is Antonelli Already the 2026 Title Favourite? The Numbers Say Yes

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
After 3 races of 2026 F1:

Antonelli: 72 pts, 2 wins, 2 poles
Russell: 63 pts
Leclerc: 34 pts
Hamilton: 33 pts
Verstappen: 12 pts

Mercedes leads constructors by 45 pts.

The question isn't IF Antonelli is the favourite anymore. It's by how much.

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Standings
